subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of the Blessed Beauty! Thy numerous letters were perused. Praise be to God, they bear witness to the spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال مبارک تحاریر متعدده شما ملاحظه گشت الحمد لله دلیل بر روح و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
